history.question: Katere predmete poučujejo v prvem letniku?
history.answer: V prvem letniku se študenti spoznajo z osnovami računalništva, matematike in splošnih računalniških principov.

history.question: Koliko ECTS kreditov imam potrebnih?
history.answer: Univerzitetni program zahteva 180 ECTS kreditov, visokošolski strokovni program pa 210 ECTS kreditov.

history.question: Tell me what courses deal with embedded systems.
history.answer:
Based on the provided context, it seems that the following courses deal with embedded systems:

* "Embedded Systems" (ECTS credits: unknown, Semester: unknown)
	+ This course aims to present students of computer science the basic approaches in the design of embedded systems, to present the actual building blocks of embedded systems (microcontrollers, memory and I/O devices), software development tools and operating systems for embedded devices and their properties.

Note that there might be other courses that also cover embedded systems, but this one specifically mentions it as a focus area.

history.question: Tell me what courses deal with embedded systems.
history.answer:
Based on the provided context, the following courses seem to deal with embedded systems:

* "Embedded Systems" (ECTS credits: unknown, Semester: unknown)
* "Computer Architecture" (ECTS credits: unknown, Semester: unknown)
	+ This course introduces students to the organization of computers and digital circuits, focusing on RISC architectures and the ARMv7 instruction set architecture.
* "Artificial Intelligence and Machine Perception" (ECTS credits: unknown, Semester: unknown)
	+ Although not exclusively focused on embedded systems, this course may touch upon topics related to embedded systems, such as robotics and real-time systems.

Please note that the availability and details of these courses may vary depending on the university and faculty.
